---
title: "Materials"
---

The coursebook as a website: [Coursebook](https://ludovicdecuypere.github.io/IntroR_MILS2026_EBook/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg role="button"}

[Coursebook](https://ludovicdecuypere.github.io/IntroR_MILS2026_EBook/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

Or if you prefer to download the pdf: <https://github.com/ludovicdecuypere/IntroR_MILS2026_Book/blob/main/_book/R-for-Statistical-Data-Analysis.pdf>

And here are the slides: 

INCLUDE SLIDES
